name: context-pack
description: Repo-local context packs and handoff checkpoints for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Route agents to focused repo context.
interface.longDescription: Context Pack gives coding agents a lightweight repo-local map before broad reading. First use is transient and does not modify the repository; explicit setup adds versioned area notes and handoff state for work that moves across sessions, agents, machines, or worktrees.
defaultPrompt: Fix a bug from focused repo context.
Review this branch without rereading the whole repo.
Debug a red CI build from the right files.
Leave this work easy to resume later.
